message.content:
**Email 1: Initial Outreach**

**Subject:** Streamline HR Onboarding in Minutes  

Dear [Prospect's Name],  

Is manual onboarding eating up your HR team's time? Our SaaS platform automates the entire process—from paperwork to training assignments—saving teams like yours 20+ hours per new hire.  

Companies such as [Similar Company] have cut onboarding time by 40%. Ready to see how?  

Reply "Demo" or book here: [Calendar Link]  

Best,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Title]  
[Your Company]  
[Your Email] | [Your Phone]  

---

**Email 2: Value Add (Follow-up Day 3)**

**Subject:** Quick Win: Automate New Hire Paperwork  

Hi [Prospect's Name],  

Following up—did you catch my note on onboarding automation? One fast win: Our tool auto-generates and e-signs compliance docs, reducing errors by 90%.  

HR leads at [Similar Company] reclaimed Fridays for strategic work. Here's a 2-min case study: [Link to Case Study].  

Thoughts? Let's chat: [Calendar Link]  

Cheers,  
[Your Name]  

---

**Email 3: Social Proof (Follow-up Day 7)**

**Subject:** How [Similar Company] Onboarded 50+ Hires Effortlessly  

Hello [Prospect's Name],  

Hoping this finds you well. [Similar Company]'s HR director shared: "Onboarding went from chaos to seamless—our tool handles it all." See their full story: [Link to Testimonial/Video].  

Imagine that for your team. Free trial setup takes 5 minutes: [Trial Link].  

Available this week? [Calendar Link]  

Regards,  
[Your Name]  

**P.S.** No credit card required for the trial.  

---

**Email 4: Pain Point Focus (Follow-up Day 14)**

**Subject:** Tired of Onboarding Delays Costing You Talent?  

Hi [Prospect's Name],  

New hires ghosting due to slow onboarding? Our platform sends personalized checklists, videos, and IT setups instantly—boosting retention by 25%.  

Don't just take my word: [Link to Infographic with Stats]. Quick call to customize for [Their Company]? [Calendar Link]  

Thanks,  
[Your Name]  

---

**Email 5: Final Push with Incentive (Follow-up Day 21)**

**Subject:** Last Chance: Free Onboarding Audit + Demo  

[Prospect's Name],  

One last nudge: Claim a free audit of your current onboarding process (valued at $500) and see 30% efficiency gains in action.  

Spots filling up—book now: [Calendar Link] or reply "Audit."  

Let's make onboarding your superpower.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Title]  
[Your Company]  

**P.S.** As an AI-assisted sequence generator, this is tailored for high open rates—feel free to tweak placeholders!
